The '''heavy artillery platform''' was a powerful self-propelled artillery platform used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It could fire volleys of [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] and destroy enemy bases in short order.<ref name="TCSWE" />
{{Imp-stub}}
